response.justification: Mohammed has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency, and clear ownership mindset through startup and open-source leadership, but lacks explicit evidence of AI-native engineering environments or direct experience with AI-generated code review at scale — critical for this role — though his work on AI-agent infrastructure hints at relevant exposure.
strengths: Proven track record in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and systems-level languages like DLang
Demonstrated operational ownership via open-source leadership, CI/CD setup, and on-call-like maintenance of critical platforms
concerns: No explicit mention of reviewing or extending AI-generated code as a core responsibility
Limited evidence of stakeholder management at staff level in AI-driven engineering orgs
German language skill is basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
